subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord of the Worlds, Who hath summoned all peoples, as one, through His Most Great Name, in such wise that [3.5s]... ...As to the question thou has asked concerning the minimum amount of property on which Huquq is payable, this was mentioned in His exalted and glorious presence and the following is what the Tongue of Grandeur uttered
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مولی العالم را سزاست که جمیع امم را وحده باسم اعظم دعوت نمود بشانی که
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
